title: VantaCode Taxonomy Cross-Reference Mapping Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating cross-reference mapping files that link a VantaCode taxonomy to an external framework or to another VantaCode taxonomy.

name.description: Human-readable name of the cross-reference mapping.

version.description: Version number. MUST be incremented on any content change.

source.description: The source VantaCode taxonomy namespace. MUST match an existing taxonomy directory name.

source_url.description: Optional canonical URL for the source taxonomy.

target_url.description: Canonical URL for the target framework.

target_namespace.description: Optional. If the target is another VantaCode taxonomy, set this to its namespace so the validator can cross-check target_id values too.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the mapping (provenance, methodology, audit trail entries).

source_tag.description: MISP triple-tag in the form vantacode-<taxonomy>:<predicate>="<value>". The hyphen-separated namespace form is REQUIRED — colon-separated forms like 'vantacode:mbt:' are invalid.

target_name.description: Human-readable name of the target item.

relationship.description: The semantic relationship between source_tag and target_id.
